title: pleurothallis ciliaris
intro: Pleurothallis ciliaris is a type of orchid, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pleurothallis ciliaris include its ability to aid in the relief of congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
